_publications._publicationTitle: mTOR kinase inhibition disrupts neuregulin 1-ERBB3 autocrine signaling and sensitizes NF2-deficient meningioma cellular models to IGF1R inhibition.

_contextSnippet: Ben-Men-1 versus NF2 (+) ACs log2FC p-value NRG1 6.28 1.45 × 10−8 HBEGF 6.76 8.33 × 10−11 APLN 5.88 1.84 × 10−10
details: Shows increased expression of NRG1, HBEGF, and APLN compared to NF2-expressing cells, with log2 fold changes of 6.28, 6.76, and 5.88 respectively
